THE 4 LEVELS OF
DELEGATION
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 1 of 16 --

WHAT IS THE GOAL OF A LEADER?
TO SPEND THEIR TIME DOING WHAT
ONLY THEY CAN
DO.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 2 of 16 --

SO HOW DO YOU DEVELOP LEADERS?
DELEGATION
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 3 of 16 --

IT IS NOT INTUITIVE TO MAJORITY OF
LEADERS TO DELEGATE PAST THEIR
WEAKNESSES BECAUSE YOU THEY ALREADY
KNOW WHAT, WHEN, WHERE & HOW TO DO IT.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 4 of 16 --

ALSO, THE TRAITS THAT MAKE MOST PEOPLE SUCCESSFUL
AS LEADERS, HINDER THEM IN GROWING OTHERS.
COMPETITIVE
DISMISSIVE OF THOSE WHO DON’T MEET STANDARDS
EXTREMELY HARD ON SELF
“PERFECTIONIST” MENTALITY
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 5 of 16 --

UNFORTUNATELY THE WORST THING YOU CAN DO
IS BECOME THE GENIUS WITH 1,000 HELPERS
(JIM COLLINS)
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 6 of 16 --

THE LEVELS OF
DELEGATION
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 7 of 16 --

LEVEL ONE: INVESTIGATION
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 8 of 16 --

DELEGATION OF RETRIEVING INFORMATION,
STATS, RESEARCH, SUMMARIZATION
LEADER TAKES IT FROM THERE TO COMPLETE
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 9 of 16 --

LEVEL TWO: INFORMED PROGRESS
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 10 of 16 --

TASK IS GIVEN WITH UNDERSTANDING AS LONG
AS UPDATES ARE REGULARLY GIVEN TO LEADER
YOU DON’T TELL MENTORE HOW TO DO TASK,
JUST WHAT NEEDS TO BE DONE
YOU ARE AVAILABLE TO HELP
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 11 of 16 --

LEVEL THREE: INFORMED RESULTS
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 12 of 16 --

TASK IS GIVEN TO MENTORE
LEADER NEED NOT BE UPDATED, JUST
DELIVERED RESULTS ONCE IT IS COMPLETE
NO INTERACTION UNTIL COMPLETION
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 13 of 16 --

LEVEL FOUR: OWNERSHIP
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 14 of 16 --

PROJECT/TASK IS ASSIGNED WITH
EXPECTATION LEADER WILL NOT BE KEPT
IN THE LOOP OR EVEN MADE AWARE OF
COMPLETION OR RESULTS TO FOLLOW.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 15 of 16 --

WHEN YOU BRING ON SOMEONE NEW OR
HAVE SOMEONE IN TRAINING, BE MINDFUL
OF WORKING YOUR WAY THROUGH THESE
LEVELS
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 16 of 16 --
